accent_strategy.description: One small vermilion launch warning held above the stack.

dominant_mass_strategy.description: A disciplined blue mass pressing from the right like locked launch momentum.

historical_anchor.description: The launch stack remains legible while the right booster joint becomes the only site of visible smoke.

final.negative_prompt: high detail, texture, noise, photoreal clutter, multiple subjects, complex background, dramatic lighting, motion blur, busy composition, ornate realism, dense foliage detail, complex sky, center-weighted composition, symmetrical layout, multiple bright accents, text, watermark, logo, ui overlay
final.prompt: Minimal surreal editorial composition. Quiet, reduced, asymmetrical image with one subtle breach in reality and high thumbnail clarity. The frame should feel paused, suspended, and slightly unresolved. The historical subject must remain legible but reduced to an emblematic silhouette. Strip forms to simple silhouettes and essential geometry only. Use one dominant environmental color field and keep every secondary tone muted or neutral. One side must carry the visual weight while the opposite side stays mostly empty. Reserve one saturated accent as a semantic signal rather than decoration. Keep surfaces quiet with only slight painterly bleed at edges. Hold the image in stillness so it feels like a paused system state with implied consequence. Maintain at least 60% negative space with an asymmetrical focal mass. Use no more than 4 colors and only 1 saturated accent. Allow exactly 1 surreal breach and keep everything else coherent. Lighting must remain soft diffuse. Do not include text, logo, ui_artifacts, motion_blur, photoreal_clutter. Editorial finish pass. Keep the scene calm, legible, and emotionally compressed without adding detail. Historical anchor: The launch stack remains legible while the right booster joint becomes the only site of visible smoke.. Historical topic: Ignition smoke. Single surreal breach: A restrained dark plume rises from the joint while the rest of the frame refuses to become dramatic.. Caption safety: keep the top UI band clear at x=0.00-1.00, y=0.00-0.12 and keep critical subject matter out of the subtitle band at x=0.08-0.92, y=0.74-0.96. Hero subject: A pale launch stack silhouette kept small enough for negative space to dominate.. Subject archetype: launch_stack. Dominant mass: A disciplined blue mass pressing from the right like locked launch momentum.. Accent: One small vermilion launch warning held above the stack.. Reflection: A quiet mirrored ground plane that keeps the launch space calm even as the breach appears.. Single subject in mind only; no source references are used. Scene intent: Keep the smoke minimal and undeniable, with no explosion spectacle or action framing..
